reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for the world-space forecast badge and select the frame index by element type.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_enemy_forecast_icon_atlas_8x40.png through AssetServer and build an eight-frame atlas for the forecast widget.
runtime_notes: Forecast badge follows the enemy head anchor in world space.
Element selection happens by atlas index rather than by swapping textures.
Icon frame size must remain legible during the 0.5 second telegraph.

context.usage: World-space icon atlas that previews the incoming spell element above the enemy during telegraph time.

shape.silhouette: Octagonal badge with a centered element glyph and a thin glow ring.

specs.lighting: Each glyph carries a bright center highlight while the octagonal frame stays gold and navy.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas is exactly 320x40 px with eight 40x40 icon frames.
Each element glyph stays centered within a 24 px inner circle.
Gold frame thickness remains 2 px on every icon so color changes do not alter silhouette weight.
